description: Linos Perros has come up with this tribute to minimalism in a sober blue shade. Crafted with a soft, curvy silhouette, this bag is inspired by the classic satchel in its styling. This piece transcends fickle trends and is a classic must-have! Height: 36 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 14 cm Textured leatherette upper Two short handles One zippered compartment at the back Brand tag hanging from the handle One main compartment with a zippered separator, a zippered pocket and two pouches Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
